description: JoeKnowsBall MLB Numerology Methodology v3 — hierarchical scoring. Tier1 exact compound matches dominate; indirect signals receive diminishing returns. Synergy bonus for 2+ independent Tier1 exact compound alignments. Players are selected and ranked only by deterministic numerology resonance. Baseball opportunity is displayed as context only and never affects alignment, qualification, or rank.
exactCompoundDefinition: player field original or compound === Universal Day rawSum

signalCapabilities.gameStartTimeNumber: disabled — requires confirmed game-time data per batter, not yet in candidate payload
signalCapabilities.teamCityBallpark: disabled — deterministic name-number formulas for team/city/ballpark defined but MLB team names not yet in scoring pipeline
signalCapabilities.opposingPitcherProfile: disabled — pitcher numerology fields collected but cross-signal scoring vs batter not yet implemented
signalCapabilities.statisticalMilestone: disabled — milestone detection requires rolling game-log lookup not in current pipeline

doubleCounting.rule: Once a source field awards points at any tier, it does not award additional points at a lower tier. Indirect signals are subject to diminishing returns — first indirect at 100%, second at 70%, third at 40%, fourth and beyond at 20%.
examples: Life Path 19 on a 19-rawSum day: exact compound (22 pts, direct, never decayed).
Life Path 46/1 on a 19/1 day: root match (11 pts, indirect, subject to decay).
Jersey 19 on a 19-rawSum day: Tier2 exact compound (18 pts, direct, never decayed).
Jersey 3 root-3 on a root-1 day with calDay-root-3: secondary root (4 pts, indirect, decayed).
Jersey 33 on Calendar Day 24/6: shared root-6, not exact compound match to 24.

synergyRules.doubleExactTier1: Two independent Tier1 fields with exact compound match: +12
synergyRules.tripleExactTier1: Three or more independent Tier1 fields: +6 additional
synergyRules.exactPlusRootTier1: One Tier1 exact compound + one Tier1 root match (different fields): +4

finalScoreFormula: rawNumerology = sum(directSignals) + sum(indirectSignals × decayMultiplier) - countercurrent + synergyBonus. Alignment Score = min(100, round(rawNumerology / normCeiling × 100)). Baseball Opportunity is displayed as context only and does not affect selection, qualification, or rank.
grokProhibitedActions: Change any calculated number or score
Change opponent, lineup status, odds, or lines
